title: Large Scale Network between Stock Movements
description: Discovering patterns and comovements, how do they relate to each other. Developed an algorithm to trade based on relative stocks.

title: Quantitative Portfolio Simulator
description: Clustered stocks through PCA and t-SNE. Designed a portfolio simulator using a rolling window of seven days that outperformed the S&P 500.

title: UCLA DataFest: Gentrification Forecast
description: Used Vector Auto-Regression to forecast future centroids in a neighborhood given leasing data, visualizing results through Matplotlib and Plotly.

title: LSTM Stock Price Predictor
description: Trained Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and RNN models to predict stock price movements and detect lead-lag dependencies in algorithmic trading.

title: LLM Task Manager & Gantt Chart Generator
description: Built a custom Large Language Model tool to automate personal organization and dynamically generate visual Gantt charts for complex workflows.

title: Semantic Knowledge Graph Pipeline
description: Architected a pipeline transforming unstructured document text into semantic knowledge graphs utilizing LLMs and Neo4j.

title: Gradescope Grade Calculator
description: Developing an automated tool to scrape and calculate current academic standing and hypothetical scores directly from Gradescope.

title: PolyLabs AI Social Media Pipeline
description: Assisted in writing an AI pipeline for generating targeted social media posts and conducted comprehensive A/B testing on marketing effectiveness.
